acceptance_criteria: Outlook tooling is disabled by default.
User can explicitly configure an Outlook / Microsoft 365 provider.
Email search is read-only and may run in `/x` if policy allows.
Email mark / move / categorize requires explicit confirmation.
Email send is blocked or future-only.
Email search result UI shows ranked candidates.
Email body is not logged by default.
Mocked Pester tests cover all Outlook workflows.
Provider auth failures stop workflow safely.
Documentation explains Graph / Microsoft 365 CLI setup and privacy model.
description: Checklist gate that closes the v0.3 milestone. Verify all 10 acceptance criteria from PRD §15.3.
notes: Privacy is the critical concern; double-check redaction pipelines for email content.
name: [gate-v03] v0.3 acceptance gate
